description_zh: 机器学习论文：任务、模型输入输出、数据集、基线、指标、结果和局限。
description_en: Machine-learning papers covering tasks, model I/O, datasets, baselines, metrics, results, and limitations.

fields.name: problem
fields.description: Extract the machine-learning task or research problem.

fields.name: method
fields.description: Extract the proposed model, architecture, training method, or algorithm.

fields.name: model_input
fields.description: Extract the data, features, modalities, or context given to the model.

fields.name: model_output
fields.description: Extract what the model predicts, generates, estimates, or classifies.

fields.name: dataset
fields.description: Extract training, validation, and test datasets.

fields.name: baseline
fields.description: Extract the principal baseline or comparison methods.

fields.name: result
fields.description: Extract the main performance results, preferably with numbers and comparisons.

fields.name: limitation
fields.description: Extract model limitations, failure cases, computational costs, or validity threats.
